title: 7 Best Beehiiv Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Find the best Beehiiv alternatives. Compare ConvertKit, MailerLite, Mailchimp, and more email marketing tools.
h1: The 7 Best Beehiiv Alternatives for Newsletter Publishers
intro: While Beehiiv excels at newsletter monetization and growth features, it may not be the right fit for every creator or business. Whether you're looking for lower pricing, better creator tools, or advanced automation, several compelling alternatives offer unique strengths. We've compared the top options to help you find the perfect email marketing platform for your needs.
why_switch: Lower pricing tiers or more generous free plans with higher subscriber limits
Better creator-focused features like landing pages, courses, or webinar hosting
More advanced automation and CRM capabilities for growing teams

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit is purpose-built for creators with visual automation workflows, subscriber tagging, and integrated commerce features that rival Beehiiv's monetization focus. It offers comparable free tier limits (1,000 subscribers) and pricing ($29/month) while emphasizing creator-friendly design and community.

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite is significantly cheaper than Beehiiv, starting at just $9/month with a 1,000-subscriber free tier, making it ideal for budget-conscious publishers. Its drag-drop editor, automation, and landing pages provide all essential features without the premium price tag.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp is the industry-standard choice for beginners, offering comprehensive features like A/B testing, landing pages, and audience segmentation at competitive pricing starting at $13/month. Its 20+ year track record and extensive integrations make it a reliable alternative for growing publishers.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign is the best choice for publishers with sophisticated marketing needs, offering advanced automation, built-in CRM, lead scoring, and SMS all from $15/month. If you're scaling beyond email and need deeper customer relationship management, ActiveCampaign outperforms Beehiiv's feature set.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo stands out with an exceptionally generous free tier supporting up to 100,000 subscribers and offering multi-channel capabilities including SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat. This makes it excellent for publishers wanting to expand beyond email without immediate costs.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse is specifically designed for creators monetizing through webinars and courses, offering native webinar hosting, online course tools, and conversion funnels starting at $19/month. It's more specialized than Beehiiv for educational content creators.

alternatives.name: Substack
alternatives.key_difference: Substack eliminates platform fees in favor of a 10% revenue share on paid subscriptions, making it ideal for newsletter writers focused purely on direct reader monetization. Unlike Beehiiv's ad network approach, Substack's model benefits writers with high paid subscription rates.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with support for up to 100,000 subscribers, compared to Beehiiv's 2,500 limit. If you need a more creator-focused alternative, ConvertKit and MailerLite both offer free tiers supporting 1,000 subscribers with solid email marketing features.

faq.q: What is the best Beehiiv alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite and Mailchimp are the top choices for small businesses, offering simple interfaces, affordable pricing starting at $9-13/month, and essential features like automation and landing pages. Both have strong Trustpilot ratings and are proven platforms for growing small business email lists.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, MailerLite starts at just $9/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month, making it significantly more affordable for publishers on a budget. Mailchimp ($13/month) and GetResponse ($19/month) also offer more cost-effective plans while maintaining quality email marketing features.
